privileged_info_summary: This task uses the real public website https://crawler-test.com/, a genuine SEO testing platform. The website contains actual non-secure form fields at URLs following the pattern /content/non_secure_form_fields_TYPE (e.g., /content/non_secure_form_fields_password_and_cc, /content/non_secure_form_fields_text). These pages exist in both HTTP and HTTPS versions and contain unsecured form fields for password and credit card data, making them legitimate security testing targets. The environment documentation explicitly confirms this is real data, not synthetic. The task keywords 'non_secure', 'password', 'form', and 'http' accurately describe the content, though the keyword 'insecure' does not appear in actual URL paths. The 'expected_urls' metadata contains inaccurate path names that do not match the actual URL structure of the website.
